title: Copyright, Trademark & Legal Symbols: Copy & Paste © ® ™
meta_description: Copy and paste copyright, registered, trademark, and other legal Unicode symbols — ©, ®, ™, ℠, ℗, §, ¶, and more. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every copyright, trademark, and legal-document symbol in Unicode — ©, ®, ™, ℠, ℗, plus section, paragraph, and reference marks. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Legal and intellectual-property symbols mark ownership, registration, and rights, while reference marks structure formal documents. This library collects the copyright and registered signs, trademark and service marks, numero and office abbreviations, and the section, paragraph, dagger, and reference marks used in contracts and citations.

sections.label: Copyright
sections.intro: Ownership marks: copyright, registered trademark, sound-recording copyright, and circled-letter variants in capital and small forms.

sections.label: Trademark
sections.intro: Trademark and service-mark signs that denote brand and service identifiers.

sections.label: Office Marks
sections.intro: Letterlike office abbreviations and the numero sign used in formal correspondence.

sections.label: Reference
sections.intro: Document marks for sections, paragraphs, footnotes, and citations.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.

related.title: Currency Symbols
related.desc: Dollar, euro, pound, yen, and every other Unicode currency sign.

related.title: Number Symbols
related.desc: Circled, superscript, Roman, and other Unicode number forms.
